introSection: Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by US manufacturer Chance Rides currently owned by RPQ Rides & Amusement

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and supports with some yellow details.

fullText:
Toboggan is a travelling steel roller coaster built by US manufacturer Chance Rides currently owned by RPQ Rides & Amusement



Red track and supports with some yellow details.

The cars are enclosed.
